hero.subtitle: Technology Consultant | Microsoft Fabric & Power BI
hero.text: Transform your data landscape with expert consulting. I help businesses unlock the full potential of Microsoft Fabric and Power BI to build modern data platforms, insightful dashboards, and data-driven strategies that deliver real results.

sections.blog_subtitle: Insights on Fabric, Power BI & Data Strategy

services_page.title: Services
services_page.subtitle: Expert Microsoft Fabric & Power BI Consulting
services_page.text: From strategy to implementation, I provide end-to-end consulting services that help your organization make the most of the Microsoft data platform.

process_page.title: How I Work
process_page.subtitle: A Structured, Transparent Process
process_page.text: Every engagement follows a proven process designed to deliver results efficiently while keeping you informed and in control at every stage.

1.title: Discovery Call
1.desc: We start with a free, no-obligation conversation. I want to understand your business, your data challenges, and what success looks like for you.

2.title: Scoping & Proposal
2.desc: Based on our discovery call, I prepare a detailed proposal that outlines exactly what I'll deliver, how long it will take, and what it will cost.

3.title: Kickoff
3.desc: Once you approve the proposal, we align on the practical details: system access, communication cadence, and key contacts.

4.title: Delivery
4.desc: Iterative development with regular progress sharing. No disappearing for weeks — you'll see tangible results at each milestone.

5.title: Handoff & Training
5.desc: Every engagement includes knowledge transfer so your team understands the solution and can maintain it independently.

6.title: Ongoing Support
6.desc: After handoff, I'm still available — whether you need a monthly retainer, ad-hoc help, or quarterly reviews.

footer.consulting_desc: Technology Consultant specializing in Microsoft Fabric, Power BI, and data platform strategy.

calculator.title: Project Estimator
calculator.intro: Answer 5 quick questions to get a ballpark estimate for your project.
